# Kubernetes Tools

## Overview

gSage AI — Kubernetes high-level dashboards.

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `k8s_dashboard` | Curated Kubernetes dashboards: cluster overview, workload health, top restarts, pending pods, recent warnings, resource pressure, namespace overview. | `k8s:read` | — | — |
| `k8s_manage` | Kubernetes write actions: restart_deployment, scale_deployment, delete_pod. Requires human approval. No batch operations. | `k8s:write` | ✓ | — |
| `k8s_observe` | Read-only Kubernetes inspection: namespaces, deployments, pods, logs, events, rollout status, resource usage. Auto-CSV on >100 rows. | `k8s:read` | — | — |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** — you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below — set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "api_server": "",
  "ca_cert": "",
  "default_namespace": "default",
  "in_cluster": false,
  "timeout": 30,
  "token": "",
  "verify_tls": true
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `api_server` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Cluster API server URL, e.g. 'https://k8s.example.com:6443'. Required unless 'in_cluster' is true. |
| `ca_cert` | `string` | — | — | `""` | PEM-encoded CA certificate of the API server. Optional but recommended for self-signed clusters; ignored when 'verify_tls' is false. |
| `default_namespace` | `string` | — | — | `"default"` | Namespace assumed when the caller omits one (default: 'default'). |
| `in_cluster` | `boolean` | — | — | `false` | When true, use the pod's mounted ServiceAccount credentials (ignores api_server / token / ca_cert). Default: false. |
| `timeout` | `integer` | — | — | `30` | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 30). |
| `token` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Service account bearer token (sensitive). Required unless 'in_cluster' is true. |
| `verify_tls` | `boolean` | — | — | `true` | Verify the API-server TLS certificate (default: true). Disable only for local/test clusters. |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_KUBERNETES__API_SERVER` | `api_server` | `string` | `""` | — | Cluster API server URL, e.g. 'https://k8s.example.com:6443'. Required unless 'in_cluster' is true. |
| `TOOL_KUBERNETES__CA_CERT` | `ca_cert` | `string` | `""` | — | PEM-encoded CA certificate of the API server. Optional but recommended for self-signed clusters; ignored when 'verify_tls' is false. |
| `TOOL_KUBERNETES__DEFAULT_NAMESPACE` | `default_namespace` | `string` | `"default"` | — | Namespace assumed when the caller omits one (default: 'default'). |
| `TOOL_KUBERNETES__IN_CLUSTER` | `in_cluster` | `boolean` | `false` | — | When true, use the pod's mounted ServiceAccount credentials (ignores api_server / token / ca_cert). Default: false. |
| `TOOL_KUBERNETES__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `30` | — | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 30). |
| `TOOL_KUBERNETES__TOKEN` | `token` | `string` | `""` | — | Service account bearer token (sensitive). Required unless 'in_cluster' is true. |
| `TOOL_KUBERNETES__VERIFY_TLS` | `verify_tls` | `boolean` | `true` | — | Verify the API-server TLS certificate (default: true). Disable only for local/test clusters. |
| `TOOL_K8S_MANAGE__AUTO_APPROVE` | `auto_approve` | `boolean` | `false` | — | When true, HITL approval requests for this tool are auto-approved by the backend without human review. Useful for lab/dev environments. DB toolconfig overrides env TOOL_<NAME>__AUTO_APPROVE; default is false. |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` — useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._

## Operations

### `k8s_manage`

- **`delete_pod`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `name` | `string` | ✓ | [restart_deployment, scale_deployment] Deployment name. [delete_pod] Pod name. |
  | `grace_period_seconds` | `integer` | — | [delete_pod] Termination grace period in seconds (default 30). Use 0 for force-delete. |

- **`restart_deployment`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `name` | `string` | ✓ | [restart_deployment, scale_deployment] Deployment name. [delete_pod] Pod name. |

- **`scale_deployment`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `name` | `string` | ✓ | [restart_deployment, scale_deployment] Deployment name. [delete_pod] Pod name. |
  | `replicas` | `integer` | — | [scale_deployment] Desired replica count (0–50). |


### `k8s_observe`

- **`describe_pod`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `namespace` | `string` | — | Namespace. Required for describe_pod, get_logs, get_rollout_status. Optional for list_pods / list_deployments / list_services / get_events / top_pods (omit for all-namespaces). Ignored for list_namespaces / list_nodes / top_nodes. |
  | `name` | `string` | — | [describe_pod, get_logs] Pod name. [get_rollout_status] Deployment name. |

- **`get_events`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `namespace` | `string` | — | Namespace. Required for describe_pod, get_logs, get_rollout_status. Optional for list_pods / list_deployments / list_services / get_events / top_pods (omit for all-namespaces). Ignored for list_namespaces / list_nodes / top_nodes. |
  | `field_selector` | `string` | — | [list_pods, get_events] Field selector (e.g. 'status.phase=Running'). |
  | `type_filter` | `string` | — | [get_events] Filter by event type (default: All). |
  | `involved_object_kind` | `string` | — | [get_events] Filter by involvedObject.kind (e.g. 'Pod', 'Deployment'). |
  | `involved_object_name` | `string` | — | [get_events] Filter by involvedObject.name. |
  | `max_results` | `integer` | — | [list_*, get_events, top_*] Maximum items to return (hard cap 500, default 100). |
  | `export_csv` | `boolean` | — | [list_*, get_events, top_*] Force CSV artifact even for small results. CSV is generated automatically when the result exceeds 100 rows regardless. |
  | `export_json` | `boolean` | — | [list_*, get_events, top_*] Persist the full result as a JSON artifact. Use only when programmatic post-processing is needed; otherwise prefer 'export_csv'. |

- **`get_logs`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `namespace` | `string` | — | Namespace. Required for describe_pod, get_logs, get_rollout_status. Optional for list_pods / list_deployments / list_services / get_events / top_pods (omit for all-namespaces). Ignored for list_namespaces / list_nodes / top_nodes. |
  | `name` | `string` | — | [describe_pod, get_logs] Pod name. [get_rollout_status] Deployment name. |
  | `container` | `string` | — | [get_logs] Container name (defaults to first container). |
  | `tail_lines` | `integer` | — | [get_logs] Last N lines (default 200, max 2000). |
  | `since_seconds` | `integer` | — | [get_logs] Only logs newer than N seconds. |
  | `previous` | `boolean` | — | [get_logs] Fetch logs of the previous container instance (e.g. last crash). Default false. |
  | `timestamps` | `boolean` | — | [get_logs] Prepend RFC3339 timestamps to each line. |

- **`get_rollout_status`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `namespace` | `string` | — | Namespace. Required for describe_pod, get_logs, get_rollout_status. Optional for list_pods / list_deployments / list_services / get_events / top_pods (omit for all-namespaces). Ignored for list_namespaces / list_nodes / top_nodes. |
  | `name` | `string` | — | [describe_pod, get_logs] Pod name. [get_rollout_status] Deployment name. |

- **`list_deployments`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `namespace` | `string` | — | Namespace. Required for describe_pod, get_logs, get_rollout_status. Optional for list_pods / list_deployments / list_services / get_events / top_pods (omit for all-namespaces). Ignored for list_namespaces / list_nodes / top_nodes. |
  | `label_selector` | `string` | — | [list_pods, list_deployments, list_services] Label selector (e.g. 'app=nginx,tier=frontend'). |
